## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe manual testing steps, or note which automated tests cover this. -->

- [ ] Tested locally in dev mode (`pnpm dev`)
- [ ] Tested production build (`pnpm build && pnpm start`)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome / Safari / Firefox
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Verified animations/transitions behave as expected

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No console errors/warnings in the browser
- [ ] No unused code, debug logs, or commented-out blocks left behind
- [ ] Accessibility checked (semantic HTML, alt text, focus states, contrast)
- [ ] Responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
